subjects.description: 24-year-old man holding an intense gaze just beyond the camera
subjects.appearance_details: young adult man with well-defined jawline, expressive eyebrows, thick dark lashes, deep brown eyes with subtle gold flecks, and crisp skin detail
subjects.relationship: single human subject in an intimate portrait close-up
subjects.location: center frame, face filling the image with eyes as the focal point
subjects.relative_size: large extreme close-up, eyes and upper face dominate the frame
subjects.orientation: facing camera directly while focusing slightly beyond the lens
subjects.pose: still portrait pose with minimal head movement and relaxed facial tension
subjects.action: maintains a steady intense gaze and blinks subtly
subjects.state_changes: eyelids blink once or twice; catchlights shift faintly; micro expression stays focused
subjects.clothing: not visible in the tight close-up
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: natural skin tone with visible pores, fine texture, and high-resolution cinematic clarity
subjects.facial_features: well-defined jawline, expressive eyebrows, thick lashes, deep brown irises with gold flecks, and sharp eyelid detail

background_setting: A softly blurred neutral background with no distracting objects, designed to draw attention entirely to the man's eyes and subtle facial movement.

lighting.conditions: Controlled cinematic portrait lighting with soft catchlights in the eyes, gentle skin highlights, and smooth falloff into the blurred background.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Controlled cinematic portrait lighting with soft catchlights in the eyes, gentle skin highlights, and smooth falloff into the blurred background.

aesthetics.composition: High-resolution 70mm film portrait feel, vivid natural eye color, shallow depth of field, intimate stillness, and exceptional facial detail.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: High-resolution 70mm film portrait feel, vivid natural eye color, shallow depth of field, intimate stillness, and exceptional facial detail.

cinematography.camera_motion: Static extreme close-up portrait, 70mm film look, very shallow depth of field, locked camera, and prolonged focus on the eyes.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

artistic_style: 70mm film-inspired realism with vivid color, precise eye detail, and quiet emotional intensity.
context: An intimate portrait studies a young man's focused gaze, using minimal motion so the viewer notices blinks and tiny eye movements.

actions.description: The man holds a steady gaze just beyond the lens as the camera remains perfectly still.
A subtle blink and minute eyelid movement reveal deep brown eyes with gold flecks in sharp focus.
He resumes the calm intense gaze while the blurred background stays soft and unobtrusive.

segments.description: Establish the static extreme close-up with the man's eyes as the central focus.
segments.key_changes: catchlights settle; background remains blurred; gaze holds steady

segments.description: Hold the portrait as he blinks subtly and the eye color detail remains crisp.
segments.key_changes: eyelids close and reopen; gold flecks flash briefly; facial muscles stay calm
segments.camera: unchanged static close-up with shallow depth of field

segments.description: End on the prolonged intimate gaze with vivid irises and soft background separation.
segments.key_changes: gaze steadies again; catchlights shimmer faintly; background blur stays constant

temporal_caption: A 24-year-old man holds an intense close-up gaze, blinking subtly while his deep brown eyes remain in crisp 70mm-style focus.
audio_description: Quiet studio room tone, faint breath, subtle eyelid movement, and no music or dialogue.
